query:
SELECT TABLE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as columns
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME IN ('platform_settings', 'feature_flags', 'audit_log', 'integration_connectors')
GROUP BY TABLE_NAME;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user sHLCts4RR6iL2PA.1ead08cf1a54 --database bBuQZrfKLoBs6LmtvQ4y6E --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as columns
FROM information_schema.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() 
AND TABLE_NAME IN ('platform_settings', 'feature_flags', 'audit_log', 'integration_connectors')
GROUP BY TABLE_NAME;

rows.columns: id, actorId, actorName, action, targetType, targetId, targetName, details, createdAt
id, key, label, description, enabledForCompanies, enabledForContractors, updatedAt, updatedBy
id, companyId, provider, apiKey, apiSecret, baseUrl, isActive, lastSyncAt, syncStatus, syncError, config, createdAt, updatedAt, webhookSecret
id, platformFeePercent, perListingFeeEnabled, perListingFeeAmount, autoClockOutMinutes, autoClockOutRadiusMeters, createdAt, updatedAt, pmsSyncIntervalHours
